title: BetterWorldGenerAtion
description: A Modpack about new World Generation and an overall better plaing experience. This Modpack is focused towards single player.
body:
# Made to play with friends via [e4mc](https://modrinth.com/mod/e4mc)

## Many World Generation Mods/Datapacks
- **Terralith**
- Amplified Nether
- Incendium
- Nullscape
- etc.

## Many New Structures
- MMV
- MES
- Towns and Towers
- etc.

## And so much more
- Many Performance/Optimization Mods
- Some Quality of Life Mods
- Huge challeng by collecting [all Mob Heads](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/customization/all-mob-heads)
